scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install
scripts.test: node --test server/tests/scrubber.test.js server/tests/assistant.test.js server/tests/aiClient.test.js server/tests/smoke/auth.test.js server/tests/smoke/patients.test.js server/tests/smoke/stats.test.js server/tests/smoke/backup.test.js server/tests/smoke/db-safety.test.js server/tests/smoke/feedback.test.js server/tests/smoke/demo.test.js
scripts.test:smoke: node --test server/tests/smoke/auth.test.js server/tests/smoke/patients.test.js server/tests/smoke/stats.test.js server/tests/smoke/backup.test.js server/tests/smoke/db-safety.test.js server/tests/smoke/feedback.test.js server/tests/smoke/demo.test.js
